context: Tests whether the agent builds the FacetPanel with correct accessibility attributes, count-based sorting, zero-count disabling, overflow limiting, active count badges, collapsible groups, and the ActiveFilterPills component with clear-all support.

checklist.name: Aria-label on aside
checklist.description: The FacetPanel root element is an <aside> with an aria-label attribute (e.g., 'Product filters')

checklist.name: Aria-expanded on toggle
checklist.description: Each facet group has a toggle button with an aria-expanded attribute that reflects the expanded/collapsed state

checklist.name: Aria-controls on toggle
checklist.description: The facet group toggle button has an aria-controls attribute referencing the id of the values list

checklist.name: Role group on value list
checklist.description: The list of facet values uses role='group' and has an aria-label attribute

checklist.name: Count descending sort
checklist.description: Facet values within each group are sorted by count in descending order (highest count first)

checklist.name: Zero-count disabled
checklist.description: Checkboxes for values with count=0 are rendered with disabled=true, UNLESS that value is already in the active filters

checklist.name: Active count badge
checklist.description: When one or more values are selected in a facet group, a badge or indicator showing the number of active selections appears on the group heading

checklist.name: Expanded by default
checklist.description: Facet groups are expanded by default (not collapsed) on initial render

checklist.name: Top 10 overflow limit
checklist.description: Facet groups with more than 10 values show only the top 10 by default, with a 'Show more' (or equivalent) toggle to reveal the rest

checklist.name: Dismissible pills
checklist.description: ActiveFilterPills renders each active filter value as a button or element that, when clicked, removes only that individual filter value

checklist.name: Clear all button
checklist.description: ActiveFilterPills renders a 'Clear all' button that is visible whenever at least one filter is active

checklist.name: Pills above grid
checklist.description: COMPONENT_NOTES.md or component structure places the ActiveFilterPills display above/before the product grid, not inside the sidebar
